memoryArtifacts.headline: Captain Edward Bangs - Easstham, Barnstable, Massachusetts

popularStory.headline: Edward Bangs bio
popularStory.description:
Captain Edward Bangs
Born October 28, 1591 in Panfield, Essex, Englandmap
Son of John Bangs and Jane (Chavis) Bangs
Brother of John Bangs, James Bangs, Jonas Bangs, Sampson Bangs, Joshua Bangs, Payne …

zh.lifeSummary: Edward Bangs於大約1591年出生在英國。他於大約1630年與Lydia Hicks在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1634年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼且在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦住了大約10年。他於1643年登記服兵役。他於1646年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦被列為town treasurer。他去世於1678年3月5日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼易亞斯坦，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦可福 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Edward Bangs于大约1591年出生在英国。他于大约1630年与Lydia Hicks在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1634年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼且在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦住了大约10年。他于1643年登记服兵役。他于1646年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦被列为town treasurer。他去世于1678年3月5日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼易亞斯坦，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波易亞斯坦可福 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Bangs
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Edward Bangs of Chichester, England, came to Plymouth Colony on board the ‘Anne’ in 1623; he is believed to have been born c. 1592.

variants.name: Banks
meanings: English: variant of Bank 5, with excrescent -s. The final -s may occasionally represent a plural form, but it is most commonly an arbitrary addition made after the main period of surname formation, perhaps under the influence of patronymic forms with a possessive -s.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Bruacháin ‘descendant of Bruachán’, a byname for a large-bellied person. The English form was chosen because of a mistaken association of the Gaelic name with bruach ‘bank’. Compare Bank 6.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Oldest Grave seen in the Memorials List

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Edward Bangs was born about 1591, in England. He married Lydia Hicks about 1630, in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He lived in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1634 and Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America for about 10 years. He registered for military service in 1643. In 1646, at the age of 56, his occupation is listed as town treasurer in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. He died before 5 March 1678, in Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Edward Bangs est né environ 1591, à Angleterre. Il a épousé Lydia Hicks environ 1630, à Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il a vécu à Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1634 et à Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique pendant environ 10 ans. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1643. En 1646, à l’âge de 56 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est town treasurer à Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé avant 5 mars 1678, à Eastham, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Edward Bangs wurde um 1591 in England geboren. Er hat um 1630 in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America Lydia Hicks geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1634 hat er in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America gelebt, und ungefähr 10 Jahre lang hat er in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er hat sich 1643 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1646, als er 56 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als town treasurer in Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb vor 5. März 1678 in Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Edward Bangs è nato il circa 1591 nel England. Lui sposato Lydia Hicks circa 1630, nel Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Vissuto a Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1634 e nel Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America per circa 10 anni. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1643. Nel 1646, all'età di 56 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come town treasurer nel Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Morì prima del 5 marzo 1678, nel Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolto a Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Bangsは約1591年にイギリスで生まれた。約1630年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニープリモウスでLydia Hicksと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1634年にはイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーに，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルエアスサムに約10年間住んでいた。彼は1643年に兵役登録をした。1646年，56歳の時，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルエアスサムでの職業はtown treasurerと記録されている。彼は1678年3月5日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーエアスサムで死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルエアスサムコブ ブリイング グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스

ko.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이
ko.Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable: 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 이스섬 커브 버이잉 그라운드
ko.lifeSummary: Edward Bangs(은)는 대략 1591년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1630년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스에서 Lydia Hicks(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1634년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이에서, 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬에서 약 10년 동안 살았다. 그는 1643년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1646년, 56세의 나이로 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 이스섬에서 town treasurer이었다. 그는 1678년 3월 5일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 이스섬에서 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 이스섬 커브 버이잉 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Edward Bangs nasceu aproximadamente 1591, em Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Lydia Hicks aproximadamente 1630, em Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele viveu em Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1634 e em Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America por quase 10 anos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1643. Em 1646, com 56 anos, sua profissão aparece como town treasurer em Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu antes 5 de março de 1678, em Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable: ков буринг гроунд, эастам, барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Edward Bangs родился около 1591 г. в местности Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Lydia Hicks около 1630 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он жил в местности плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1634 году и в местности эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика около 10 лет. В 1643 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1646 году, в возрасте 56 лет, работал по профессии town treasurer в местности эастам, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер перед 5 марта 1678 г. в местности эастам, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности ков буринг гроунд, эастам, барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Edward Bangs nació aproximadamente 1591, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Lydia Hicks aproximadamente 1630, en Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Vivió en Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1634 y en Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America durante unos 10 años. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1643. En 1646, a la edad de 56 años, su ocupación registrada era town treasurer en Eastham, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Murió antes de 5 de marzo de 1678, en Eastham, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultado en Cove Burying Ground, Eastham, Barnstable, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
